(Original)
10/10 i love los tres. #touse

genuinely where do i even begin. los tres, you are by far my favorite place in the world. i love you more than my home, i love you more than the mall, and i love you more than a disney world vacation. i have had the best food and drinks here. my friends and i come here all the time and always leave happier and healthier and with more memories. i hope someday in the future my children will also come here with their friends and have the time of their lives. i love you los tres. love, one of your biggest fans!!!!
Live laugh love los tres! Burrito mondays are the best!

This is my favorite place in east lansing. Most of the servers are nice but sometimes I get attitude from one of them. Love the rest though!! Especially the bouncer!!
love this best best restaurant in downtown East Lansing!!!!! 10/10 best $5 margs

love this best best restaurant in downtown East Lansing!!!!! 10/10 best $5 margs

Wanting to enjoy a margarita on a hot day? Expect it to not be full after paying for it (which the staff will fight you and say they have a “line” they fill to) and to have an automatic 20% gratuity on top of it

If you go there intending to enjoy a margarita, expect them to not fill it all the way up and they will add gratuity on it as well, no matter what. Asked them to fill it up all the way and they said no.
